changes.what_changed: Renamed tag 101 from 'tag 1' to 'GA4 - Event - lead_submit'.
changes.why_changed: Tag name does not identify platform, tag type, or event purpose.
manual_review_flags: Confirm no external plain-text dependency on the old name before import or use.
changes.rollback_note: Restore the tag name from 'GA4 - Event - lead_submit' to 'tag 1'; if rolling back the variable rename, also restore any {CONST - GA4 Measurement ID} token references to {id}.

changes.what_changed: Updated the GA4 event tag measurementId variable token from {{id}} to {{CONST - GA4 Measurement ID}} to preserve the renamed constant variable reference.
changes.why_changed: GTM variable tokens are name-based in exported parameter strings; the token must follow the proposed variable display-name rename to preserve the same referenced variable value.
manual_review_flags: Confirm in GTM Preview or import review that the tag still resolves the measurement ID constant value G-TEST501.
changes.rollback_note: Restore the tag parameter token to {{id}} if the variable rename is rejected or rolled back.
